contexts.context: Were both <mark>born</mark> since the Shadow             Lifted, or rather             ...
...the founders of 'modern' art, were in being <mark>born</mark> when they were, so that they came to manhoofd...
...thought we had troubles enough, and the misunderstanding was <mark>born</mark>.      Meanwhile the mayor was worrying about something else...
...smile at weddings Where bride and bridegroom Were both <mark>born</mark> since the Shadow Lifted,or rather Moved elsewhere. Never...
...the founders of 'modern' art, were in being <mark>born</mark> when they were,so that they came to manhood before...
